name: vwhybe-mcp-mockapi
description: MCP server for creating and managing mock REST APIs with UI

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,ui -c cyan,magenta "node packages/server/test-server.js" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/ui"
scripts.start:all: npm run build --workspace=packages/server && concurrently -n server,ui -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --workspace=packages/server" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/ui"
